flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Butte College rose 36% between 2007 and 2010 ($3.5k → $4.8k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Butte College rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 ($7.8k → $9.3k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Butte College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (5.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Butte College rose 74% between 2007 and 2010 (6.9k → 12.1k).
